name: neelthee-mansion

metadata.name: neelthee-mansion
metadata.summary: A text-based adventure game set in Neel-thee’s mansion.

documentation:
# Neel-thee's Mansion of Amnesia

**Neel-thee's Mansion of Amnesia** is a text-based adventure game where players explore a mysterious mansion, interact with objects and creatures, and strive to escape while uncovering their lost identity. 

## Documentation

- [Installation Guide](docx/INSTALL.md)
- [Changelog](docx/CHANGELOG.md)
- [Contributing errors](docx/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [how to start](docx/tutorial-getting-started.md)
- [FAQ](docx/faq.md)

## Features

- Explore a richly detailed mansion with various rooms and interactable objects.
- Encounter and interact with different creatures.
- Collect and use items throughout the game.
- Navigate through quests that drive the narrative forward.

classes.name: neelthee_mansion.creatures.base_character

methods.name: neelthee_mansion.creatures.base_character.take_damage
documentation:
Reduces the character's hit points by the specified amount of damage.

Args:
    damage_taken (int): The amount of damage to be subtracted from the character's hit points. Default is 5.

Returns:
    None
Represents a base character in the game, including both players and creatures.

classes.name: neelthee_mansion.creatures.creature_type

methods.name: neelthee_mansion.creatures.creature_type.__init__
documentation:
Initializes a creature type with the specified type and optional subtype.

Args:
    type (str): The primary type of the creature.
    subtype (str, optional): The subtype of the creature. Defaults to None.

methods.name: neelthee_mansion.creatures.creature_type.check_type
documentation:
Returns the type and subtype of the creature.

Returns:
    tuple: A tuple containing the type and subtype of the creature, or just the type if no subtype is specified.

methods.name: neelthee_mansion.creatures.creature_type.__str__
documentation:
Returns a string representation of the creature type.

Returns:
    str: A string representation of the creature type.
Represents the type of a creature in the game.

classes.name: neelthee_mansion.creatures.creature

methods.name: neelthee_mansion.creatures.creature.__init__
documentation:
Initializes a new creature instance.

Args:
    name (str): The name of the creature.
    hp (int): The hit points of the creature.
    atpw (int): The attack power of the creature.
    dropped_items (list[str], optional): A list of items dropped by the creature when defeated. Defaults to [].
    description (str, optional): The description of the creature. Defaults to None.
    flavor_text (str, optional): The flavor text associated with encountering the creature. Defaults to None.
    type (creature_type, optional): The type of the creature. Defaults to creature_type('beast').
    crit_chance (float, optional): The chance of the creature landing a critical hit. Defaults to 0.05.

methods.name: neelthee_mansion.creatures.creature.type_text_flavor_text
documentation: Prints the flavor text associated with encountering the creature.

methods.name: neelthee_mansion.creatures.creature.type_text_description
documentation: Prints the description of the creature.

A class representing a creature in the game.

Attributes:
    name (str): The name of the creature.
    hp (int): The hit points of the creature.
    atpw (int): The attack power of the creature.
    dropped_items (list[str]): A list of items dropped by the creature when defeated.
    description (str): The description of the creature.
    flavor_text (str): The flavor text associated with encountering the creature.
    type (creature_type): The type of the creature.
    crit_chance (float): The chance of the creature landing a critical hit.

classes.name: neelthee_mansion.creatures.Guard

methods.name: neelthee_mansion.creatures.Guard.__init__
documentation:
Initializes a new guard instance.

Args:
    name (str): The name of the guard.
    hp (int): The hit points of the guard.
    atpw (int): The attack power of the guard.
    dropped_items (list[str], optional): A list of items dropped by the guard when defeated. Defaults to [].
    description (str, optional): The description of the guard. Defaults to None.
    flavor_text (str, optional): The flavor text associated with encountering the guard. Defaults to None.
    type (creature_type, optional): The type of the guard. Defaults to creature_type('humanoid').
    crit_chance (float, optional): The chance of the guard landing a critical hit. Defaults to 0.05.
    current_room (str, optional): The current room where the guard is located. Defaults to None.
    patrol_route (list[str], optional): The list of rooms the guard patrols through. Defaults to None.
    patrol_type (str): The type of patrol the guard is doing. Defaults to normal.

methods.name: neelthee_mansion.creatures.Guard.move
documentation: Moves the guard depending on his patrol type.

methods.name: neelthee_mansion.creatures.Guard.check_detection
documentation:
Checks if the guard has detected the player.

Args:
    player_room (str): The current room where the player is located.

Returns:
    bool: True if the player is detected, False otherwise.

A class representing a guard that patrols in the game.

Attributes:
    current_room (str): The current room where the guard is located.
    patrol_route (list[str]): The list of rooms the guard patrols through.

methods.name: neelthee_mansion.creatures.NPC._get_response
documentation: Return a response from the NPC based on the topic asked.

methods.name: neelthee_mansion.creatures.NPC._generic_response
documentation: Default response if no known keyword is found in the player's input.

functions.name: neelthee_mansion.utils.perform_action_on_matches
documentation:
Perform an action on all items in the list that are the same as the target.

```
param input_list

List of items

param target

The target item to match

param action

A function that defines the action to perform on matched items

return

The updated list
```

functions.name: neelthee_mansion.utils.get_all_matches
documentation:
Return a list of all items in the list that are the same as the target.

```
param input_list

List of items

param target

The target item to match

return

List of matched items
```

functions.name: neelthee_mansion.utils.has_named_arg
documentation:
Check if the function 'func' has an argument named 'arg_name'.

```
param func

Function to inspect

param arg_name

Name of the argument to check

return

True if the argument exists, False otherwise
```

functions.name: neelthee_mansion.utils.calculate_easter_date
documentation: Easter calculation (based on the "Computus" algorithm)

functions.name: neelthee_mansion.utils.type_text
documentation:
Function to type text with optional color formatting.

Arguments:
text -- the text to be typed out
newline -- whether to print a newline at the end (default: True)
delay -- delay between each character in seconds (default: 0.075)

functions.name: neelthee_mansion.Mansion_of_Amnesia.parse_command
documentation: Function to parse command

functions.name: neelthee_mansion.Mansion_of_Amnesia.battle
documentation:
Simulate a battle between the player (and allies) and monsters.

Args:
    player (PC): The player character.
    good_guys (list): The list of allies to help the player.
    bad_guys (list): The list of monsters to battle the player.
    last_room: The previous room before the battle.

Returns:
    None if all bad guys are defeated, else the remaining bad guys.

functions.name: neelthee_mansion.Mansion_of_Amnesia.player_turn
documentation:
Handle a character's turn during the battle.

Args:
    player (PC): The player or ally.
    monster (creature): The monster being fought.

functions.name: neelthee_mansion.Mansion_of_Amnesia.monster_turn
documentation:
Handle a monster's turn during the battle.

Args:
    player (PC): The player or ally.
    monster (creature): The monster attacking.

functions.name: neelthee_mansion.Mansion_of_Amnesia.perform_attack
documentation:
Perform an attack action.

Args:
    attacker (PC): The attacking character.
    defender (creature): The defending monster.

functions.name: neelthee_mansion.Mansion_of_Amnesia.handle_victory
documentation:
Handle the logic when the player and allies defeat all monsters.

Args:
    player (PC): The player character.
    monsters (list): The list of defeated monsters.

functions.name: neelthee_mansion.Mansion_of_Amnesia.calculate_damage
documentation:
Calculate the damage inflicted by the attacker on the defender.

Args:
    attacker: The attacking character.
    defender: The defending character.

Returns:
    int: The calculated damage.

functions.name: neelthee_mansion.Mansion_of_Amnesia.calculate_damage_range
documentation:
Calculate the damage range based on attack power.

Args:
    atpw (int): Attack power of the combatant.

Returns:
    tuple[int, int]: Minimum and maximum damage range.

functions.name: neelthee_mansion.Mansion_of_Amnesia.use_special_ability
documentation:
Allow the player to use a special ability during combat.

Args:
    player (PC): The player character.
    monster (creature): The monster being fought.

functions.name: neelthee_mansion.Mansion_of_Amnesia.select_target
documentation:
Select a target from a list of characters.

Args:
    chooser: The entity (e.g., player or AI) selecting the target.
    targets (list): List of characters to select from.

Returns:
    The selected target.

functions.name: neelthee_mansion.Mansion_of_Amnesia.handle_sleep_command
documentation: except KeyError as e:
type_text(f"KeyError: {e} - This might be due to an undefined command or incorrect arguments.", colorTrue=color_coding)
except ValueError as e:
type_text(f"ValueError: {e} - This might be due to incorrect arguments provided.", colorTrue=color_coding)
except Exception as e:
type_text(f"Unexpected Error: {e}", colorTrue=color_coding)
